stem:
Give the correct matching for the following pairs:

(A) O(log n)    (P) Selection
(B) O(n)        (Q) Insertion sort
(C) O(n log n)  (R) Binary search
(D) O(n^2)      (S) Merge sort
reason: Parser treated the table rows (A)-(D) as options A-D and merged all answer choices into option D text; correctOptions incorrectly included both 'D' and 'A' instead of just 'D'

stem:
Match the pairs in the following:

(A) O(log n)    (p) Heapsort
(B) O(n)         (q) Depth-first search
(C) O(n log n)  (r) Binary search
(D) O(n^2)      (s) Selection of k^th smallest element in a set of n elements
reason: Parser treated the table rows (A)-(D) as options A-D and merged all answer choices into option D text; the actual answer choices were not parsed as separate options
